title: Homalobus palliseri
taxonomy: Homalobus palliseri is classified within the family Apiaceae. This plant is a species of flowering plant. Further classification places it within the order Apiales and the class Magnoliopsida. It is a member of the family Apiaceae, which includes plants commonly known as carrots, parsley, and parsnips. The exact classification may be subject to slight variations depending on the source.
